role_summary: the concurrent auditor performs real -time audits of banking operations to ensure  compliance with rbi guidelines and intern al policies.
responsibilities: • review daily banking transactions and operations   • ensure adherence to rbi norms and bank policies   • identify irregularities, frauds, and control lapses   • report exceptions on a timely basis   • support rbi inspections and statutor y audits   • maintain detailed audit documentation
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong knowledge of banking operations and rbi regulations   • high attention to detail
